name: Italian Sausage Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut Italian sausage into 2-inch lengths.
2. Brown the sausage in olive oil (about half cook it), then remove from the pan and set aside.
3. In the same pan, make a roux with flour and the remaining olive oil.
4. Add onions, celery, and bell pepper to the roux.
5. Stir and cook until tender or clear.
6. Gradually add water and stir until smooth.
7. Add wine (adjust amount as desired), parsley, and garlic.
8. Pour in red cayenne pepper, Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce, dried mint, and tomato sauce.
9. Stir well to combine everything.
10. Bring the mixture to a boil.
11. Add salt to taste.
12. Return the sausage to the pan and bring back to a boil.
13. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 3-4 hours.
14. Serve over spaghetti topped with cheese.
From Justin Wilson's "Outdoor Cooking With Indoor Help"
